title: Data Protection Lifecycle in Cloud Computing
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential and continuous techniques used to protect data and software throughout its lifecycle in a cloud environment.
relationships: Data is encrypted (e.g., AES) before being stored in Cloud Storage
Data in Transit is protected via TLS/SSL protocols between Cloud Storage and End User
Data in Use is processed in secure, isolated environments (e.g., enclaves)
Software is protected through Code Signing and Integrity Checks before execution
The process is cyclical, returning to 'Data at Rest' after processing
